# test(interp): Tier 1 unit tests for InterpretabilityDiagnostics

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `f1b8f6b3f5e0` — test(interp): Tier 1 unit tests for InterpretabilityDiagnostics

**Body**:

32 tests covering:

- __init__ validation (TypeError on non-string model_name, ValueError
  on empty string / window < 1 / empty run_id / unknown dtype)
- run_id autogen + uniqueness + explicit override
- Protocol conformance via isinstance(Diagnostic) per
  rules/orphan-detection.md §1 (load-bearing structural assertion)
- Context-manager __enter__ returns self, __exit__ closes cleanly
- API-only refusal across 8 prefix variants (gpt-/o1-/o3-/o4-/claude-/
  gemini-/deepseek-); open-weight identifiers classified correctly
- _load_model refuses API-only with RuntimeError
- probe/logit_lens return the canonical not_applicable payload on
  API-only models; empty DataFrames with mode column defined
- Probe input validation (length mismatch, single-class rejection)
- Sklearn probe math on synthetic linearly-separable features —
  CV accuracy >0.8 on 20-sample 2D Gaussian mixture
- Default SAE release resolution (Gemma-2-2B → 2B release,
  Gemma-2-9B → 9B release)
- _fingerprint_prompt deterministic + 8-hex-char contract
- close() idempotent
- local_files_only=True by default (security posture per
  specs/kaizen-interpretability.md)
- allow_download=True overrides local_files_only

Refs #567 (PR#4 of 7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
